user.bio: e-girl

comment.body:
Listen, 
I don't like how it keeps rejecting my reversion model's trendline. 
Vol is realized today as expected typicall opex flow that was predicted by the skew. 
Markets prices vol crush after opex. 
But vol regime is shifted. Very sensitive. 
This is why I kept the puts from yesterday as hedge. 
Now i took 1dte and intraday position but keep in mind that we are far from the mean, so a reversion isn't inherently bearish, i would probably add more át the vanna flip and closed my puts from yesterday, but any rebound would be used to closed my longs. 
Not too much tho. 
Note that i took small alloc position now and that i was long since the bottom. We faded those downsticks pretty accurate ☝️
